The '''mother''' of [[Norky]] was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] individual. Norky's [[Parent/Legends|mother]] lived with her [[Norky's father|husband]] and her son on the [[Forest/Legends|forest]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]].
